rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENT CHI KIN SUN
rulings.Calendar Matter: General Demurrer And Motion To Strike Of Administrator To Request For Stay; Request For Dismssal, Or In The Alternative Request For Jury Trial On The Issues Of Ownership And Possession Of Real Property; And Request For Judicial Notice Of The Court'S Records In This Case
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer and motion to strike are overruled and denied without prejudice. Respondent's reply brief improperly raises several independent grounds for relief for the first time. These arguments may or may not have merit, but in any case, cannot be raised for the first time on reply. The prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order. Any party seeking to challenge the Court's tentative ruling must contact the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 10/28/2014.
